title: antidesma pentandrum var. lobbianum
intro: Antidesma pentandrum var. lobbianum, also known as Lobbianum, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Antidesma pentandrum var. lobbianum include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Antidesma pentandrum var. lobbianum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to create herbal remedies.
